approvedBy: Steve via Codex main session overnight approval
approvalSource: Steve approved the overnight Dev-Hub intelligence build and instructed Codex to park blocked work and keep going. This repair covers the protected gate blocking all ships after google:health returned delegated invalid_grant while service-account direct Sheets reads still passed.
scopeSummary: Make foundation:verify capture google:health delegated-auth failure as structured health data, prove service-account direct read fallback, and pass only when Google Workspace is already governed degraded/not safe to use.
constraints: Do not repair Google Admin, domain-wide delegation, OAuth, Gmail, or credentials in this card.
Do not change npm run google:health strict operator behavior.
Do not run source sync, extraction, route apply, backlog auto-promotion, or model/provider calls.
Do not send Telegram, email, Slack, Agent Feedback, or public messages.
Focused proof is static/read-only and performs no Google API calls.
